title: Jeb Wool
description: Sheep named "jeb_" can now be sheared for Jeb Wool, which shifts color as an item and turns into a random colored wool when placed.
body:
This datapack adds the ability to obtain Jeb Wool by shearing sheep named `jeb_`.
![A freshly sheared sheep named "jeb_"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a290c8212fb4994f589ec9af0344d4c0de8e2247.png)
Jeb Wool will constantly shift hue while in item form:
![A piece of Jeb Wool in the inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/759b9a33704a75758ff03c31606b65bec3bd84a5_0.webp)
When placed in the world, Jeb Wool will turn into a random block of wool:
![A row of randomly colored wool blocks created from placing Jeb Wool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67c350581981fd3232e7e9dfd1791fa08129ef4b.png)
